channel.title: Tim Alamenciak – Research Audio
channel.description: Audio versions of selected research publications by Tim Alamenciak.
channel.itunes:author: Tim Alamenciak

item.title: Machines in the loop: Challenges and opportunities for environmental evidence synthesis research in the artificial intelligence era
item.description: Machines in the loop: Challenges and opportunities for environmental evidence synthesis research in the artificial intelligence era
item.itunes:summary: Machines in the loop: Challenges and opportunities for environmental evidence synthesis research in the artificial intelligence era
item.itunes:author: Tim Alamenciak, Amy Bachhuber, Joseph R. Bennett, Steven J. Cooke, Kian L. Drew, Daniel Dylewsky, Emily McKnight, Pat Moore, Ana Hernandez Martinez De La Riva, Bronwyn Rayfield

item.title: Dimensions of Effective Volunteer Restoration Techniques in North America
item.description: Dimensions of Effective Volunteer Restoration Techniques in North America
item.itunes:summary: Dimensions of Effective Volunteer Restoration Techniques in North America
item.itunes:author: Tim Alamenciak, Elise Gornish, Stephen D. Murphy

item.title: What makes a convivial community tool? Investigating grassroots ecological restoration
item.description: What makes a convivial community tool? Investigating grassroots ecological restoration
item.itunes:summary: What makes a convivial community tool? Investigating grassroots ecological restoration
item.itunes:author: Tim Alamenciak, Stephen D. Murphy

item.title: Motivations for Volunteers to Participate in Ecological Restoration: A Systematic Map
item.description: Motivations for Volunteers to Participate in Ecological Restoration: A Systematic Map
item.itunes:summary: Motivations for Volunteers to Participate in Ecological Restoration: A Systematic Map
item.itunes:author: Tim Alamenciak, Stephen D. Murphy
